data.title: Evaluation of the Effect of Ginkgo Biloba on Phenytoin Pharmacokinetics
data.brief_summary: This study will examine how the herbal remedy ginkgo biloba may affect the body's elimination of other medicines. Many people take ginkgo biloba to improve memory, mental alertness and overall feeling of well being. Since this product is considered a food supplement and not a drug, it is not subject to the rigorous pre-market testing required for prescription and over-the-counter (OTC) drugs. As a result, information has not been collected on possible interactions between ginkgo biloba and other
data.eligibility_criteria:
Male or female.

Healthy by medical history and physical exam.

Age greater than 21 years old.

No concurrent medications.

Non-smoker (for at least 6 months if prior history of smoking).

Laboratory values wihin the following guidelines: AST/SGOT less than or equal to 1.5 times the upper limit of n
data.sponsor: National Institutes of Health Clinical Center (CC)
